extended_help:
Choose 1 of 3 classes (**cannot be changed**):

⚔️ **Warrior**
> HP 120 | ATK 15
> Passive: +10% DEF

🔮 **Mage**
> HP 80 | ATK 22
> Passive: +15% Mana Regen

🏹 **Archer**
> HP 100 | ATK 18
> Passive: +10% Crit

Type `/start` then click a class button.
already_desc:
You are already registered as **{{class}}**.
Class cannot be changed, continue your adventure!
title: 🛡️ Nova Chronicles — Choose Your Destiny
welcome:
Welcome, **{{username}}**!
The world of Nova is in chaos, choose your class now and get **1,000 coins** as starting capital.
footer: Choose wisely — class cannot be changed!
not_yours: 😅 Hey, this is not your button! Type /start.
